chunks.title: Daughters of Zelophehad Present Case
chunks.reason: Narrative introduction of the daughters and their petition to Moses.

chunks.title: Inheritance Law for Daughters
chunks.reason: Divine ruling establishing inheritance succession when a man dies without sons.

chunks.title: Moses to See the Land
chunks.reason: God commands Moses to view the Promised Land before his death.

chunks.title: Moses Prays for a Successor
chunks.reason: Moses petitions God to appoint a leader for the congregation.

chunks.title: Appointment of Joshua
chunks.reason: God instructs Moses on how to commission Joshua as leader.

chunks.title: Joshua Commissioned
chunks.reason: Narrative conclusion of Moses fulfilling God's command to install Joshua.
